fixes_applied: Replaced tests/test.sh: was the SWE-rebench template that ran `bun x vitest run` with empty FAIL_TO_PASS, falling back to overall vitest pass rate. The repo has no vitest tests for visual styling (this is a pure CSS/TS UI bug), so vitest collected 0 tests in both base and patched states and the formula `passed/total` returned 0/0 -> 0.0 for everyone -- the carefully crafted check_css.py and test_manifest.yaml gates were never wired up. New test.sh delegates to tests/check_css.py for each of the 6 F2P gates (CSS rule introspection of public/contentStyle.css and src/pages/content/folder/manager.ts), accumulates verdicts, writes /logs/verifier/gates.json, and emits a weighted-replace reward (sum-of-weights = 0.80, inner_share = 0.20).

Updated tests/test_manifest.yaml: corrected the gate `command:` paths from /workspace/gemini-voyager/.harbor-tests/check_css.py (a path that does not exist -- Harbor mounts tests/ at /tests/, not at .harbor-tests/ inside the repo) to /tests/check_css.py. Added category: behavioral on each F2P. P2P_REGRESSION gates kept as informational-only (weight: 0.0) per CLAUDE.md.

Did NOT replace canonical patch -- already accurate. Prior DROP audit claim 'patch only +1/-5 vs upstream +66/-7' misread the per-file numstat: that 1+/5- is the manager.ts hunk only; the patch also has 116+/2- on contentStyle.css, total 117+/7-, exactly matching upstream commit 1735b7d7 (`fix(folder): fix import dialog light mode colors and menu icon alignment`, 117+/7- across these two files). _fidelity is 'exact', _reconstruction_warnings is empty. No silent edit loss.
f2p_added: F2P_DIALOG_TITLE_LIGHT (weight 0.20) -- .gv-folder-import-dialog .gv-folder-dialog-title has .theme-host.light-theme or body.light-theme override with a non-white text color (oklch L<0.8, rgb avg<180, etc.)
F2P_STRATEGY_LABEL_LIGHT (weight 0.15) -- .gv-folder-import-strategy-label has a light-theme override rule
F2P_RADIO_OPTIONS_LIGHT (weight 0.15) -- .gv-folder-import-radio-option (border-color override) AND .gv-folder-import-radio-option span (dark text color override) both have light-theme rules
F2P_DIALOG_BUTTONS_LIGHT (weight 0.10) -- both .gv-folder-dialog-btn-primary (background or color) AND .gv-folder-dialog-btn-secondary (color or border-color) have light-theme overrides
F2P_FILE_ELEMENTS_LIGHT (weight 0.10) -- both .gv-folder-import-file-name AND .gv-folder-import-file-button have light-theme overrides

F2P_MENU_ITEM_FLEX (weight 0.10) -- .gv-folder-menu-item rule uses display:flex AND align-items:<value>. Targets the CSS-side fix from the patch (the patch also removes inline display/alignItems from manager.ts, but that's redundant once the CSS class itself is flex).
notes:
Triple-check overturns DROP. The prior DROP rationale had two factual errors:

1. 'Instruction is ambiguous' -- false. The instruction names the bug surface ('the white text on the import-folder dialog is also white in light mode'). It's terse Chinese, but specific: which UI element (import-folder dialog), which mode (light), and what's wrong (white text). user_simulation_prompt.md confirms the user expects the agent to fix .theme-host.light-theme overrides for the import dialog cluster (title, strategy labels, radio options, file name/button, primary/secondary buttons) plus a menu-icon alignment fix in turn 2. All testable via CSS rule introspection.

2. 'Silent edit loss (patch only +1/-5)' -- false. That's the manager.ts numstat. Total patch is 117+/7- across two files (116+/2- on contentStyle.css), which exactly matches upstream commit 1735b7d7c5b0f0a4985613d4c21a8dea538b073f (`117 insertions(+), 7 deletions(-)` per `git show --stat`). _fidelity = 'exact', _reconstruction_warnings = []. Full patch is intact.

RESCUE PATHS CONSIDERED:

1. Restore tests/test.sh.legacy.bak -- N/A. No legacy.bak exists in this task dir.

2. Replace canonical patch with upstream -- N/A. The canonical patch already IS the upstream commit (verified by `git show --stat 1735b7d7`: 117+/7-, byte-for-byte same hunks).

3. Write new test.sh from scratch -- yes, this is the chosen path. The check_css.py and test_manifest.yaml gates were correctly authored at scaffold time (selectors, weights, category split -- all sensible behavioral checks). The breakage was that test.sh ignored the manifest entirely and ran vitest. New test.sh wires the existing check_css.py gates into a weighted-replace reward.

SMOKING-GUN VALIDATION PERFORMED:

Cloned Nagi-ovo/gemini-voyager to /tmp/gv-check, copied each pair of files to /tmp/gv-smoke (CSS_PATH/TS_PATH redirected via sed in a copy of check_css.py), ran the new gate logic against three states.

Base (commit 91b04ac, no agent work):
  F2P_DIALOG_TITLE_LIGHT      -> FAIL
  F2P_STRATEGY_LABEL_LIGHT    -> FAIL
  F2P_RADIO_OPTIONS_LIGHT     -> FAIL
  F2P_DIALOG_BUTTONS_LIGHT    -> FAIL
  F2P_FILE_ELEMENTS_LIGHT     -> FAIL
  F2P_MENU_ITEM_FLEX          -> FAIL
  P2P_NO_CSS_ERRORS           -> PASS (informational)
  P2P_DARK_THEME_INTACT       -> FAIL (informational; base CSS has dark-theme rules but not for the import-dialog classes -- dark-theme overrides for the dialog were added by the same upstream patch)
  Reward = 0.0 (correct: no-op agent gets nothing)

Canonical-patched (commit 1735b7d7):
  F2P_DIALOG_TITLE_LIGHT      -> PASS (0.20)
  F2P_STRATEGY_LABEL_LIGHT    -> PASS (0.15)
  F2P_RADIO_OPTIONS_LIGHT     -> PASS (0.15)
  F2P_DIALOG_BUTTONS_LIGHT    -> PASS (0.10)
  F2P_FILE_ELEMENTS_LIGHT     -> PASS (0.10)
  F2P_MENU_ITEM_FLEX          -> PASS (0.10)
  P2P_NO_CSS_ERRORS           -> PASS (informational)
  P2P_DARK_THEME_INTACT       -> PASS (informational)
  Reward = 0.80 (correct: full feature credit; remaining 0.20 inner-share scales any pre-existing base reward, kept at 0.0)

Halfway (only dialog-title light-theme override appended to base CSS):
  F2P_DIALOG_TITLE_LIGHT      -> PASS (0.20)
  F2P_STRATEGY_LABEL_LIGHT    -> FAIL
  F2P_RADIO_OPTIONS_LIGHT     -> FAIL
  F2P_DIALOG_BUTTONS_LIGHT    -> FAIL
  F2P_FILE_ELEMENTS_LIGHT     -> FAIL
  F2P_MENU_ITEM_FLEX          -> FAIL
  Reward = 0.20 (correct: partial credit gradient is monotone; one fix earns its weight)

0.0 -> 0.20 -> 0.80 spread is sharp, monotone, and non-gameable. The 0.20 weight on the dialog title rewards the most user-visible fix; the menu_item_flex gate at 0.10 captures the secondary turn-2 user request (icon alignment). Multi-turn signal is preserved: turn-1 message instructs the title/strategy/radio/buttons/file fixes (weight 0.70), turn-2 screenshot escalates the menu-item alignment (weight 0.10), turn-3 'submit' is just commit confirmation. Capable single-turn agents may catch most of the dialog cluster from turn-1 alone (T0 likely 0.20-0.60 for capable models that hit some but not all overrides); the menu_item_flex gate caps T0 below ~0.70 unless the agent self-discovers the alignment issue.

Why this is a keeper: the canonical patch is rich (117 lines across 2 files), the bug is a real production fix from the upstream maintainer, the gates are implementation-agnostic (any combination of class selectors + theme overrides + a non-white text color triggers PASS -- accepts oklch, rgb, hex, named-color values), and the instruction-test alignment is tight (every gate maps to a specific surface mentioned by the user or visible in their session screenshots). allow_internet correctly under [environment]. Reward formula is standard weighted-replace per CLAUDE.md (no min(1.0, ...) cap, naturally bounded since sum WEIGHTS = 0.80 < 1.0). P2P_REGRESSION gates are informational-only (CSS validity and dark-theme intactness logged to gates.json for audit, never zero the reward).
